name: amanar
description: Amanar — a portable, Pi-first agent-kit: skills, enforcement hooks, and tools in one plugin, with a runner that gates completion on evidence.

plugins.name: amanar
plugins.description: Amanar agent-kit for Claude Code: skills (interview, plan, adversarial-review, deliver, remember, author-skill, onboard) plus a PreToolUse backpressure gate, funneled through bin/amanar.
